steps.title: Compute the mean of data set X
steps.content: Data set X is $7,11,11,15$. Its sum is $44$, so its mean is $$\frac{44}{4}=11$$

steps.title: Compute the mean of data set Y
steps.content: Data set Y has the same four values plus $31$, so its sum is $44+31=75$. Its mean is $$\frac{75}{5}=15$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Since $11\lt 15$, the mean of data set X is less than the mean of data set Y. This matches Choice B.
